label: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning

node.label: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning
node.definition: Neural learning is constrained or augmented by logic, programs, equations, or known physical structure.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas and feeding downstream nodes such as Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs, Neuro-symbolic models.
